outputSummary: Optimized vite.config.ts with chunk splitting (vendor, three, motion) and raised chunk warning limit. Verified ArcReactorCore is correctly lazy-loaded in Dashboard.tsx. Added scripts/README.md with dev/build/preview documentation. Verified successful, warning-free build.
perfImprovements: Split Three.js / React Three Fiber into separate chunks
Split Framer Motion into separate chunk
Lazy loading of ArcReactorCore preserves initial bundle size
